surfaces.purpose: Pending-actions home base: aggregated feed of everything awaiting input
surfaces.title_text: Pending ⏎ Refresh ⏎ _ ⏎ ✖ ⏎ Not connected yet ⏎ Connect a model in Settings to activate your job search. Once it's running, anything that needs your input will show up here.

surfaces.purpose: Conversational assistant that fills profile/criteria gaps + job actions
surfaces.title_text: Job Assistant ⏎ _ ⏎ ✖ ⏎ The Job Assistant isn't connected yet ⏎ Connect a model in Settings to activate the assistant. Once a model is connected it can answer questions about your applications and surface anything that needs your input.

surfaces.purpose: Credential vault: per-tenant sign-ins sealed at rest
surfaces.title_text: Saved sign-ins ⏎ _ ⏎ × ⏎  ⏎ Save the username and password for a job site so the assistant can sign in for you. Passwords are encrypted and are never shown again or sent back to this screen. ⏎  ⏎ Account sign-ins (used everywhere) ⏎  ⏎ Set these once — they apply to every job search. Your Google sign-in lets the assistant use “Sign in with Google” on any site; the default sign-in is used only if a site requires creating a brand-new account. ⏎  ⏎ Google sign-in ⏎ not set ⏎ Save Google sign-in ⏎ Default sign-in for new accounts ⏎ not set ⏎ Save default sign-in ⏎ A specific site sign-in ⏎ Site /

surfaces.purpose: Live remote view / takeover during irreducible human steps
surfaces.title_text: Live application session ⏎ _ ⏎ × ⏎  ⏎ Watch the assistant fill out your application in real time. You can take over at any moment to do the parts only you should do — creating an account, clearing a verification, and the final submit. ⏎  ⏎ No live session is open yet. ⏎ Take control ⏎ Open in new tab ⏎ Refresh sessions ⏎ Resume after a step you did yourself ⏎  ⏎ Use these once you have finished a step the assistant can't do on its own. ⏎  ⏎ I created the account — continue ⏎ I cleared the verification — continue ⏎ Let the assistant help on the desktop ⏎ Turn on ⏎  ⏎ For the parts that live out

surfaces.purpose: OOBE wizard: Connect a model -> Your profile
surfaces.title_text: Welcome — let's get you set up ⏎ ✓ Welcome ⏎ 2. Connect a model ⏎ 3. Your profile ⏎ Connect a model ? ⏎  ⏎ Add a model source below — a local model (e.g. Ollama) or a cloud API. Once it is enabled and shows a model, continue. ⏎  ⏎ Add Models (Endpoints) ⏎ Connect local models first, or add a cloud API. ⏎ LOCAL ⏎ API ⏎ Added Models (Endpoints) ⏎ Manage the endpoints you've added. ⏎ LOCAL ⏎ None ⏎ API ⏎ None ⏎ Save & continue ⏎ ← Back ⏎ Skip for now →
